The '''Second Battle of Tatooine''' was a battle of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
Following the [[Recapture of Sarapin|recapture]] of [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] learned from Separatist officer [[Zian Finnis]] that the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] had knowledge of the whereabouts of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]].

Once on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], Echuu and his Padawan, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Naat Reath]], met [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Jabba knew that [[Boorka]] was in league with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]] and felt that Boorka had gone too far. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] starting army was not enough to destroy the Confederacy's [[Confederacy way station|base]] on the planet.

==The battle==
When they went into [[Jundland Station]] near [[Mos Osnoe]], the citizens told them that [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] had been attacking at night, but they would still give the Jedi the resources and worker droids necessary to build up their army. Echuu and Naat went to the [[Unidentified Tusken Raider camp (Jundland Station)|Tusken Village]] east of town and killed all of them. The citizens then gave them resources and worker droids.

After massing up an army, Echuu and Naat killed Boorka, and Jabba rewarded them for the deed. Republic forces then destroyed all Separatist presence on Tatooine and discovered a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] outpost on [[Aereen]].
